segments.transcript: The power of a god cannot be overcome. Zamza, this is the providence of the world. Even gods are merely being restricted to the limited power determined by property that powers. Although great is not unlimited, that voice how dare you disobey me? I am Mennardo, I was here at the beginning and I will proclaim the end. But that's impossible. Drug, it is time for you to choose.

transcript: The power of a god cannot be overcome. Zamza, this is the providence of the world. Even gods are merely being restricted to the limited power determined by property that powers.
